Name: ClearWater Sand Filter System
Short description: High-performance sand filter system for crystal clear water.
Description:
The ClearWater Sand Filter System provides superior filtration for your pool, removing debris, dirt, and fine particles to keep your water crystal clear. Its durable construction and efficient design make it a reliable choice for pool owners.

Specifications:

Name: SolarHeat Pool Heater
Short description: Eco-friendly solar pool heater for extended swimming seasons.
Description:
The SolarHeat Pool Heater harnesses the power of the sun to warm your pool water, extending your swimming season without increasing energy costs. This eco-friendly heating solution is easy to install and virtually maintenance-free.

Features:

  • High-efficiency solar collector panels
  • Modular design for customizable heating capacity
  • Automatic temperature control system
  • Durable UV-resistant materials
  • Compatible with existing pool systems
  • Zero operating costs

Specifications:

  • Panel dimensions: 120cm x 240cm
  • Heating capacity: Approximately 2-5°C increase per day (weather dependent)
  • Recommended panel area: 50% of pool surface area
  • Flow rate: 2-4 GPM per panel
  • Warranty: 10 years

Name: AquaBalance Complete Water Care Kit
Short description: All-in-one water care kit for balanced and healthy pool water.
Description:
The AquaBalance Complete Water Care Kit provides everything you need to maintain perfectly balanced and healthy pool water. This comprehensive kit includes precisely measured chemicals and easy-to-follow instructions for hassle-free pool maintenance.

Kit Contents:

  • Chlorine tablets (5 kg)
  • pH increaser (1 kg)
  • pH decreaser (1 kg)
  • Alkalinity increaser (1 kg)
  • Calcium hardness increaser (1 kg)
  • Algaecide (1 L)
  • Clarifier (1 L)
  • Complete test kit with digital reader
  • Detailed instruction manual

Benefits:

  • Maintains proper sanitization
  • Prevents algae growth
  • Ensures water clarity
  • Protects pool equipment
  • Enhances swimmer comfort
Attribute 2 value(s): Small pools, Medium pools, Large pools

Name: Digital Water Testing System
Short description: Professional-grade digital water testing system for precise measurements.
Description:
The Digital Water Testing System provides laboratory-grade accuracy for all critical water parameters. This advanced testing system takes the guesswork out of water chemistry, ensuring your pool water is perfectly balanced for safety, equipment protection, and swimmer comfort.

Features:

  • Digital photometer for precise readings
  • Tests for 11 different water parameters
  • Large backlit display
  • Waterproof housing
  • Memory storage for test history
  • Automatic temperature compensation
  • Includes carrying case and all testing reagents

Parameters Tested:

  • Free Chlorine
  • Total Chlorine
  • Bromine
  • pH
  • Alkalinity
  • Calcium Hardness
  • Cyanuric Acid
  • Copper
  • Iron
  • Salt
  • TDS
Attribute 3 value(s): Basic (4 parameters), Standard (7 parameters), Professional (11 parameters)
